;<span id="Secondary_storage">secondary storage</span>
:place where multimedia files of a [[Glossary:Collection|collection]] are stored. For example, in very large collections, multimedia files can be stored on CD-ROM ('''secondary storage'''), while all the frequently accessed or modified files are stored on the user's hard disk ([[Glossary:Primary_storage|primary storage]]). When you first create your [[Glossary:Collection|collection]], the [[Glossary:Primary_storage|primary storage]] equals the '''secondary storage'''. '''Secondary storage''' can be inspected or modified with '''[[Toolkit menu|Toolkit]] : [[Options]] : [[Access tab in Options|Access]] : Secondary storage'''
